name: Dizznem Bot
postCreateCommand: wget -q https://johnvansickle.com/ffmpeg/releases/ffmpeg-release-amd64-static.tar.xz && tar xf ffmpeg-release-amd64-static.tar.xz && sudo mv ffmpeg-*-amd64-static/ffmpeg /usr/local/bin/ffmpeg && sudo apt-get install libopus0 libopus-dev -y --allow-unauthenticated && pip install -r python/requirements.txt --break-system-packages
